message.ae2nobyproduct.disabled: Byproduct removal is disabled in the config
command.ae2nobyproduct.not_a_player: This command must be run by a player.
command.ae2nobyproduct.no_network: Look at a block in an AE2 network, then run the command.
command.ae2nobyproduct.inspect.clean: No byproducts found across %s pattern provider(s) in this network.
command.ae2nobyproduct.inspect.report: Found byproducts in %s pattern(s) across %s of %s pattern provider(s); /ae2nobyproduct strip-all would remove them.
command.ae2nobyproduct.strip_all.nothing: No byproducts to remove in this network.
command.ae2nobyproduct.strip_all.preview: %s pattern(s) across %s provider(s) would be cleaned. Run the command again within 30 seconds to apply.
command.ae2nobyproduct.strip_all.done: Removed byproducts from %s pattern(s) across %s provider(s).
